plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: UWC Trucking uses your location to show the live position of your truck to dispatch while you are on an active delivery.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: UWC Trucking keeps sharing your truck's location with dispatch for the whole delivery — even when the app is closed or your screen is locked — and stops the moment the trip ends.

plugins.cameraPermission: UWC Trucking uses your camera to capture proof-of-delivery photos at each stop.
plugins.photosPermission: UWC Trucking accesses your photos so you can attach delivery orders and invoices to a booking.

extra.//: Production API on Railway. For local dev against your machine, set this to your LAN IP, e.g. http://192.168.100.154:3000 (localhost only works on the iOS simulator).
